title: SkillProposal
description: Proposal artifact for a candidate skill pattern identified during a plan phase. Proposals must be reviewed and approved by a human before the pattern is promoted to the active skill library under skills/patterns/.

proposed_by.description: Agent name that generated this proposal.

task_slug.description: The task artifact slug under plans/artifacts/.

phase_id.description: Phase during which the pattern was identified.

pattern_name.description: Short human-readable name for the pattern.

confidence.description: Estimated confidence (0–1) that this pattern is cross-plan applicable. Must be ≥ 0.85 to qualify for proposal.

status.description: Review status. Only human reviewers may set APPROVED.

problem.description: One paragraph describing the recurring challenge.

pattern_description.description: 3–5 sentence description of the reusable approach.

evidence.description: At least two concrete citations supporting the pattern.

applicability.description: Which agent roles or workflow contexts benefit from this pattern.

skills_index_searched.description: True if skills/index.md was searched and no duplicate was found.

independent_occurrences.description: List of at least 2 independent task/phase slugs where this pattern appeared.

proposed_destination.description: Relative path where the skill file would be created (e.g., skills/patterns/pattern-slug.md).

reviewer_notes.description: Optional notes from the human reviewer.
